## Description
Add a CSS file to decorate the web page. 

## Checklist

- [ ] Comment
- [ ] Color
- [ ] CSS Variables and Fallbacks
- [ ] Background Color
- [ ] 3 Unique Relative Units
- [ ] 3 Absolute Relative Units
- [ ] Margin
- [ ] Padding
- [ ] Borders
- [ ] Text
- [ ] Display
- [ ] Sizing
- [ ] Position
- [ ] Pseudo-class
- [ ] Layouts
- [ ] Responsiveness
- [ ] Fonts
